scripts.build: cd frontend && bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run build
scripts.dev:ai: cd ai-service && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8001
scripts.check:frontend:targeted: cd frontend && bunx eslint src/App.tsx src/components/ui/BackendStatusBanner.tsx src/pages/GamePage.tsx src/pages/HomePage.tsx src/pages/LobbyPage.tsx src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx src/services/apiErrors.ts src/services/apiService.ts src/services/signalRService.ts src/stores/useAuthStore.ts
